title: Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks
description:
A Forge mod that adds multiplayer synchronization for mods using the PlayerAnimator library, specifically made for the Kimetsunoyaiba mod
Also adds other tweaks to the game, like sword swing particles.
body:
# Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks (Forge)
#### aka *The Forgotten Necessities* update
A comprehensive Forge mod that enhances the [Kimetsu no Yaiba mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kimetsunoyaiba) with multiplayer features, visual effects, and gameplay enhancements.

Please check my [wiki](https://github.com/YeeticusFinch/KimetsunoyaibaTweaks/wiki) for more information.

Join us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/W8K962vQFT)

---
## Frequently Asked Questions

### Help I have the item stacking glitch

- There is a glitch where if you hold an item then suddenly new items of that same type will no longer be able to stack on that item
- "_if i tried picking up 4 blocks of wood one would just go into another corner while the other 3 were in a stack_"
- **FIX: update to version 1.6.443 or higher**

### Where did the the custom swords go?

- The new swords (like ice and frost) are now in KnY Extra Additions
- curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kny-extra-additions
- https://modrinth.com/mod/kny-extra-additions
- https://github.com/YeeticusFinch/KnY-Extra-Additions/

### My world creation is stuck at 100%

- UPDATE: Region files for Mt Fujikasane and Swordsmith Village are now in this mod:
  - [https://modrinth.com/mod/kny-worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/kny-worlds)
- This means that Mt Fujikasane isn't importing properly
- Try upgrading to the latest version of Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks
- Otherwise, you can fix it manually:
- Go to your .minecraft folder --> kimetsunoyaibamultiplayer --> mt_fujikasane_cache
- If this folder is empty, then you've got a problem
- https://github.com/YeeticusFinch/KimetsunoyaibaTweaks/tree/main/region
- ^^ Download all the region files from this GitHub link
- Place all those .mca files into minecraft/kimetsunoyaibamultiplayer/mt_fujikasane_cache/
- Reload the mod and try again

### Where can I get help with this mod?

- I don't usually check comments on the mod page
- If you need support, please join on discord: https://discord.gg/W8K962vQFT
- Or send an email to carlfromca@gmail.com

### The  game crashes on mod loading

- Make sure you have forge 47.4.0
- Make sure you have the forge versions for 1.20.1 for all the following dependency mods
  - Kimetsunoyaiba
  - Mob Player Animator
  - Player Animator
  - GeckoLib
  - KnY Worlds
- Make sure you don't have Optifine, it's completely incompatible

### My spawns are messed up, there are no Hashira or Kizuki demons or named characters spawning?

- Go into the config for Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks (aka Kimetsunoyaiba Multiplayer)
- Disable enhanced spawning
- Enhanced Spawning will prevent named characters, hashira, and kizuki demons from spawning - outside of raids and quests and special biomes/structures

### How do I configure this mod?

- I recommend using a config mod, like Configured or Forge Config Menus
- Alternatively, you can go into your minecraft folder --> config --> Kimetsunoyaiba Multiplayer
- You can edit the .toml files directly

### Missing textures

- Yes sorry I haven't finished making all the assets yet

---

## ✨ Features

### 🎭 Animation Synchronization
- **Multiplayer Animation Support**: Makes PlayerAnimator animations visible to all players in multiplayer
- Detects when a player starts/stops an animation
- Sends animation data (player, animation name, looping flag) to the server
- Server rebroadcasts animations to all nearby clients
- Uses MobPlayerAnimator to display animations on other players
- Works in both **LAN** and **dedicated servers**

### ⚔️ Sword Display System
- **Visual Sword Display**: Nichirin swords are displayed on your character when not being held
- Automatically places swords on your hip or back when stored in inventory
- Supports up to 2 swords displayed simultaneously (left and right positions)
- Swords disappear from display when equipped or removed from inventory
- **Fully Configurable**:
  - Choose between hip or back placement
  - Adjust position, rotation, and scale for each sword independently
  - Separate configurations for left/right and hip/back positions
  - Config location: `config/kimetsunoyaibamultiplayer/sword_display.toml`

### ✨ Particle Effects
- **Sword Swing Particles**: Configurable particle effects when swinging nichirin swords
- Particle mapping system for different sword types
- Trigger modes: Animation-based or attack-based
- Customizable colors, sizes, and particle types
- Config location: `config/kimetsunoyaibamultiplayer/particles.toml`

### 🦅 Enhanced Crow System
- **Quest Markers**: Crows display markers when carrying quest information
- **Custom Models**: GeckoLib-based 3D crow models
- **Animation Support**: Flying animations for kasugai crows
- **Waypoint Navigation**: Crows fly to quest locations
- Config location: `config/kimetsunoyaibamultiplayer/entities.toml`

### 🔫 Gun Animation Support
- Dynamic gun animations for rifle and other firearms
- Automatic detection and animation playback
- Compatible with Kimetsu no Yaiba firearms

---

## 🛠 Requirements
- **Minecraft Forge** `1.20.x` (other versions may work but are untested).  
- **PlayerAnimator** mod (installed on both client and server).  
- **MobPlayerAnimator** mod (installed on both client and server).  
- Other mods that use PlayerAnimator (e.g. Kimetsu no Yaiba).  

---

## 📦 Installation
1. Download the latest release of:
   - `PlayerAnimator`
   - `MobPlayerAnimator`
   - `KimetsunoyaibaMultiplayer (this mod)`

2. Place both `.jar` files in your `mods/` folder (client and server).  

3. Launch Minecraft with Forge.

---

## 🎮 Commands

The mod includes several test and debug commands:

- `/testanim` - (Server) Plays test animation on all connected players
- `/testanimc` - (Client) Tests client-side animation and syncing
- `/testparticles` - Tests sword particle effects
- `/debugparticles` - Displays particle configuration debug info
- `/testanim <animation>` - Plays a specific animation
- `/testcrowquest` - Tests crow quest marker system
- `/debugcrow` - Shows debug information for nearby crows
- `/testcrowrender` - Spawns marker entities at crow positions to debug visibility

All commands require operator permission level 2.

---
